page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 32 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or GPUs are bundled with this instance, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25%, reflecting the moderate 2.5 GHz clock speed of this CPU generation. However, multi-core performance scales effectively, with stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core scores all registering in the middle 50% average range. Memory bandwidth tests also show average performance, though the Passmark memory score is positioned in the bottom 25%.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers a balanced compute-heavy profile without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelizable workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. Appropriate workloads include multi-threaded compilation, static web serving, Redis operations, and medium-sized LLM inference tasks, where multi-core scaling compensates for lower single-thread speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and does not include local storage or GPU hardware. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show a contrast between weak single-core execution and average multi-core scaling, with stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores landing in the middle 50% tier. Memory bandwidth remains average, though memory latency tests show weaker relative performance. This instance is best suited for parallelized, compute-bound workloads such as multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, and medium-scale database or Redis operations where dedicated CPU resources are required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 64 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for compute-bound tasks.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core compute-optimized instance delivering balanced multi-threaded performance and 64 GB of RAM for parallelized workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory with a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for multi-threaded compilation, web serving, and Redis
